humanSummary.text: Final re-audit found no P0/P1 blockers. Default and explicit apply report paths now reject pre-existing source/output aliases, symlinked sidecars, and canonical bypasses. A residual same-user concurrent path-swap risk remains for future fd-relative/no-follow hardening.

findings.title: Apply report writer remains path-based after validation
findings.description: The repaired apply command validates source/output aliases and symlinked parents before writing, but the final report write still delegates to path-based create/write/rename behavior. A same-user concurrent process with write access could theoretically swap the sidecar parent between validation and rename.

evidence.detail: Final re-audit found pre-existing symlink and canonical bypass cases are covered, but fd-relative no-follow writes are not used for the final report write.
cargo test -p kaifuu-delta and cargo test -p kaifuu-cli passed after repair.

findings.impact: The normal and pre-existing collision cases required by KAIFUU-048 are fixed, but hardened local adversarial writes would benefit from fd-relative no-follow report creation.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: Apply report writes use fd-relative or equivalent no-follow semantics for the managed sidecar parent.
A concurrent or pre-created sidecar parent symlink cannot redirect report writes into source or output after validation.
Regression tests cover parent replacement, destination symlink, and normal apply report output.

proposedDagNode.title: Apply report fd-relative no-follow writer
proposedDagNode.summary: Harden Kaifuu apply report output so the final report write uses fd-relative or equivalent no-follow semantics instead of relying only on path validation before a path-based write.
deliverables: No-follow report parent and destination open/write path
Concurrent or swapped sidecar parent regression tests
Documentation of the residual local filesystem trust model
acceptanceCriteria: Apply report writes cannot follow a sidecar parent symlink introduced after validation.
Destination symlinks and parent replacement attempts fail with semantic diagnostics before writing into source or output.
Normal default and explicit report-output cases keep passing.
auditFocus: Symlink following during atomic report writes
